name: COMMUNITY ALTERNATIVES OF THE BLACK HILLS

violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. New manager started at end of January. Will need serve safe certification within 90 days of employment as kitchen manager.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Need test strips for quat sanitizer.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine. -Reached readings of 152F, 154F, 156F.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Box of napkins stored on the floor.

Backflow prevention. — --Plumbing system was not installed to preclude backflow of a solid, liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply system. -Need to have physical air gap with drain pipe for dishwasher and drain.
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
